review_scope: artifact hash and CellDep pinning requirements
notes: This file is a template, not an attestation.

The request contract generated at target/novaseal-external-attestation-adapter.json lists the exact external reviewer fields, review_scope, artifact hash, and source tree hash this attestation must satisfy.

The request_handoff block must reference the current target/novaseal-external-evidence-handoff-bundle.json hash, blake2b-256(person=NovaExtHandoff) hash algorithm, and external_bip340_tcb_review_attestation group.
A real attestation must come from an external reviewer and must match the reviewed artifact hash.
